Home / Services / Outdoor Lighting

Outdoor Lighting

Enhance the beauty and safety of your property with professionally installed outdoor lighting.

Outdoor lighting not only enhances the beauty of your property but also provides added safety and security. Our outdoor lighting service includes the design and installation of custom lighting systems that highlight your landscape's best features. We use high-quality fixtures and energy-efficient LED bulbs to create a warm and inviting ambiance. Our experienced team can design a lighting system that meets your specific needs and budget. We offer a variety of lighting options, including path lighting, accent lighting, and security lighting. Our installation process is meticulous and unobtrusive, ensuring that your landscape remains undisturbed. Whether you want to illuminate your front walkway, highlight your favorite trees, or create a relaxing outdoor living space, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. Consider the dark evenings in Nashville during the winter; outdoor lighting can make a big difference. We consider light pollution and offer solutions that minimize impact on neighbors.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Lighting Design: Create a custom lighting plan that enhances your landscape's beauty and safety.
  2. 02 Step 2: Fixture Selection: Choose high-quality and energy-efficient lighting fixtures.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation: Install the lighting system with minimal disruption to your landscape.
  4. 04 Step 4: Adjustments & Fine-Tuning: Make adjustments to ensure the lighting is perfect for your needs.

Benefits

  • Enhanced curb appeal
  • Increased property value
  • Added safety and security
  • Extended outdoor living space

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of outdoor lighting fixtures do you use?

We use a variety of high-quality lighting fixtures, including LED, halogen, and low-voltage options. LED fixtures are the most energy-efficient and long-lasting, while halogen fixtures provide a brighter, more natural light.

How much does it cost to install outdoor lighting?

The cost of outdoor lighting installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations to provide a detailed estimate.

Do you offer maintenance for outdoor lighting systems?

Yes, we offer maintenance services for outdoor lighting systems, including bulb replacements, fixture cleaning, and wiring repairs.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with outdoor lighting? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +16153477312
